rules_simulated.FTMO_2_STEP: Challenge 10% target, 5% max daily loss, 10% max loss, 4 min trading days, unlimited period.
rules_simulated.FTMO_VERIFICATION: Verification 5% target, 5% max daily loss, 10% max loss, 4 min trading days.
rules_simulated.FUNDED: No profit target; survival under daily and max loss limits.

strategies_compared.TP1.4_BE0.5_BF70: Shadow comparator only; unique difference is BE 0.4R to BE 0.5R.

why_100_not_base: Daily loss breaches begin at 1.00% in the conservative equity/MAE proxy.
The extra speed is not worth the breach risk for institutional paper planning.
why_075_defensible_ceiling: Challenge and Verification pass rates remain high.
It is a ceiling, not a mandatory setting.
why_050_prudent_funded: Funded account objective is survival first, not speed.
It leaves more distance from daily loss and max loss limits.
It is better aligned with capital preservation while forward evidence accumulates.

streak_interpretation.non_win_streak: Includes BE and psychological dry periods.
streak_interpretation.pure_sl_streak: Actual monetary losing streak; Phase25 and shadow both had pure SL streak 4.
streak_interpretation.prop_firm_implication: Funding breach risk comes from monetary/equity loss, not non-win streak alone.

limitations: Intraday equity is approximated with available MAE/SL proxy, not full tick path.
R-based ledgers do not include exact broker commissions and swaps.
FTMO and prop-firm contracts can change; manual rule review remains mandatory before any real action.
next_step: PHASE32_FTMO_PAPER_EVALUATION_PLAN only; no real and no MT5.
